subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! These are servants who have turned their faces in sincerity toward Thy gracious Countenance and have walked the straight path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هولاء عباد اخلصوا وجوههم لوجهک الکریم و سلکوا فی الصراط المستقیم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for teaching, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the concourse on high
